relevantSections: Sections on data protection, encryption, and key management
Section 404 — data integrity controls for financial reporting

keyDataTypes.protection: Encryption (AES-256), tokenization, or truncation per PCI DSS Req 3
Encryption at rest and in transit, access controls, DLP
Database encryption, activity monitoring, integrity controls
Access controls, DLP, file encryption for board materials
End-to-end encryption, network segmentation, SWIFT CSP compliance

bnmSpecificRequirements.requirement: Confidential data at rest must be encrypted using strong cryptographic algorithms
bnmSpecificRequirements.implementation: AES-256 TDE for databases, FDE for endpoints, CMK for cloud

bnmSpecificRequirements.requirement: Financial institutions must maintain control of encryption keys for cloud-hosted data
bnmSpecificRequirements.implementation: BYOK for cloud KMS, on-premises HSM for master keys

bnmSpecificRequirements.requirement: Data in transit must be encrypted across all network channels
bnmSpecificRequirements.implementation: TLS 1.2+ for all communications, mTLS for internal APIs

bnmSpecificRequirements.requirement: Maintain encrypted backup copies with offline/air-gapped storage
bnmSpecificRequirements.implementation: 3-2-1-1-0 backup strategy with immutable and air-gapped copies
